Pro Services

Artistic Excellence

The Academy

Curated classes designed for every age and skill level. From first steps to professional performance.

The Prodigy

Junior Batches

Ages 4-12. Building foundations with joy and technique.

Discover dance through play and learn fundamental techniques in a fun, supportive environment.

Schedule: 3 classes/week

The Urban

Teen Squad

Ages 13-19. Focus on style, performance, and expression.

Explore contemporary styles, build confidence, and master the art of stage presence.

Schedule: 4 classes/week

Mastery

Adult Open Class

For those who never stopped dreaming. All levels.

Transform your passion into skill. All levels welcome in our dynamic adult community.

Schedule: Flexible

Empowerment

Premium Ladies Batch

"A private, premium space for women to rediscover themselves through movement."

A sanctuary exclusively for women to explore dance, build confidence, and celebrate their femininity.

Why Dream of Dance

Excellence Redefined

Expert Faculty

Industry veterans with 15+ years experience

Luxury Studios

State-of-the-art facilities with premium acoustics

Small Batches

Personalized attention in intimate settings

Performance Opportunities

Regular showcases and professional stages

Ready to Begin Your Journey?

Join our community of passionate dancers and discover the transformative power of movement.

Enroll Now

Dream of Dance Studio is dedicated to elevating dance culture through professional training, event choreography, and masterclasses.
